text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for Tracen Academy's yearly summer
camp. Symboli Rudolf stays behind until the last
minute conducting final checks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the time crunch, she's totally unhurried,
and she makes it in perfect time for the summer
camp's official opening with a little help from
Maruzensky.
